title: fraxinus excelsior var. parvifolia
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. parvifolia, also known as small-leaved ash, is a variety of the ash tree species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior var. parvifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Fraxinus excelsior var. parvifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin care and wound healing.
